section.heading: State and local permits
section.chapeau: The provision of credit assistance under the CIFIA program with respect to a project shall not—

paragraph.content: relieve any recipient of the assistance of any project obligation to obtain any required State or local permit or approval with respect to the project;
limit the right of any unit of State or local government to approve or regulate any rate of return on private equity invested in the project; or
otherwise supersede any State or local law (including any regulation) applicable to the construction or operation of the project.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 109–58, title IX, § 999F, as added Pub. L. 117–58, div. D, title III, § 40304(a), Nov. 15, 2021, 135 Stat. 999.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 16376, Pub. L. 109–58, title IX, § 999F, Aug. 8, 2005, 119 Stat. 923, terminated the authority provided by former part J on Sept. 30, 2014, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 113–67, div. A, title III, § 301(a), Dec. 26, 2013, 127 Stat. 1181.

note.heading: Wage Rate Requirements
note.p: For provisions relating to rates of wages to be paid to laborers and mechanics on projects for construction, alteration, or repair work funded under div. D or an amendment by div. D of Pub. L. 117–58, including authority of Secretary of Labor, see section 18851 of this title.
